essence: Studies microorganisms to understand their behaviour, impacts, and applications in health, industry, and environment.

identity.title: Microbiologist
identity.summary: Designs and conducts experiments on bacteria, viruses, and other microbes for research, diagnostics, or industrial processes.

salary.notes: Senior researchers and specialists in clinical microbiology command higher salaries.

qualifications: Degree in microbiology, biology, or related field
Experience with aseptic technique and microbial assays
Knowledge of biosafety and containment procedures

lifestyle.description: Laboratory research or clinical work with strict biosafety practices and detailed experimental protocols.

habits: Keeps up to date with literature and methods
